title: SyncCheckpoint
description: Local-first sync checkpoint capturing offline queue state, last-sync position, and sync health for a SourceOS device. Supports offline replay and recovery.

deviceRef.description: DeviceIdentity URN for the device this checkpoint describes.

checkpointAt.description: Timestamp at which this checkpoint was recorded.

syncState.description: Current sync health state of this device.

lastSyncedAt.description: Timestamp of the last successful sync with a remote or peer device.

lastSyncedRemoteRef.description: Remote endpoint or peer device URN for the last successful sync.

queueDepth.description: Number of LocalOperationLog entries currently in the offline queue awaiting sync.

offlineQueueRefs.description: LocalOperationLog URNs pending sync in the offline queue.

replayPending.description: Whether offline-queued entries are pending replay on reconnection.

replaySafeQueueDepth.description: Number of queued entries with replaySafe=true, eligible for automatic replay.

policyDecisionRefs.description: Policy Fabric decision refs governing sync admission and replay.
